rulings.Case Title: MOLLY PETTIT VS. ANITA MARGRILL et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 30, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT ANITA MARGRILL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION: PLAINTIFF ALLEGES CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION IN PARAGRAPH ELEVEN; REQUEST FOR TREBLE DAMAGES IS BASED ON 37.9(F) FOR CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION. UNCERTAINTY IS DISFAVORED AND THE COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENTLY CLEAR AS TO WHAT RELIEF PLAINTIFF IS SEEKING FOR WHAT FACTUAL CLAIM. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION: ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT, THE CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION: RULING BASED ON FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION BEING OVERRULED. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION: THE FACTS ALLEGED IN PARAGRAPH ELEVEN REFLECT A CLAIM OF BAD FAITH. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MOLLY PETTIT VS. ANITA MARGRILL et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 30, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT ANITA MARGRILL'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED FOR THE REASONS STATED WITH RESPECT TO THE DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SY MUNDINE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 30, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANT SY MUNDINE, JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE THREE DAY NOTICE IS INCONSISTENT AND IS NOT CURED BY THE PHRASE "AND/OR" OR THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE A GRIEVANCE. THE COURT IS REQUIRED TO STRICTLY CONSTRUE A NOTICE TO QUIT. =(302/PJM/AP)
